svg.title: TourneyOps System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: High-level architecture showing Next.js frontend, Spring Boot backend with internal modules, PostgreSQL database, and external services including Zepto Mail and geocoding providers.

g.text: Java 17 · Spring Boot 3.5 · Spring Security · Hibernate/JPA
League · Knockout · Group-to-Knockout · Challenger · Double Elim · Fixed Matches · Gauntlet
Global exception handler (AOP) · consistent API response envelope
